items.title: 'Big things coming! - what next for Zuffa Boxing after 'incredible' UK debut?
items.summary: Even before Chris Billam-Smith’s brutal battle with Ryan Rozicki and gruelling hometown victory, Dana White was already left 'pumped' by the early success of Zuffa Boxing’s first show on UK soil.

items.title: Iran's World Cup team lands in Mexico amid US visa row
items.summary: All of Iran's group games are in the US, but players and support staff will have to fly in and out of the country on match day.

items.title: How Scotland reached the World Cup - told by those who made it happen
items.summary: Tom English speaks to those who returned Scotland to the men's World Cup finals for the first time since 1998 about the epic win over Denmark.

items.title: World Cup 2022’s ‘sexiest fan’ Ivana Knoll now making her own way as DJ and mixing it with music royalty
items.summary: IVANA KNOLL has been making it as a DJ since shooting to fame at the World Cup in 2022. The Croatia superfan became one of the most recognisable faces in Qatar for her daring outfits and stunning looks. Ivana, 33, made appearances at all of Croatia's games in their run to the third-place play-off ma

items.title: Switzerland’s World Cup training camp surrounded by SNAKE AREA as players and staff warned
items.summary: SWITZERLAND'S World Cup stars are on red alert after being warned of SNAKES next to their training camp. The Swiss have jetted out to San Diego to prepare for their World Cup opener against Qatar on June 13. The team are already dealing with humid temperatures in the US as they get used to their...

items.title: Dropped France star goes to Harvard University just five miles from team-mates’ World Cup base
items.summary: EDUARDO CAMAVINGA headed to Harvard University after missing out on France's World Cup squad... just five miles from Les Blues' training base. The Real Madrid superstar, 23, was surprisingly left out of boss Didier Deschamps' 26-man roster. Rather than sulk, Camavinga jetted across the pond to visit
